sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93525" key="*sebastofantiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σεβαστο-φαντικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n93525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pertaining to the flamen Augusti</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρήματα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">funds collected by him</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">544.21</biblScope> </bibl> (Ancyra, <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
